mapper.select: select * from mw_contact where contact_id = #{contactId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into mw_contact(name, mobile, email, position, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{position}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update mw_contact set name = #{name}, mobile = #{mobile}, email = #{email}, position = #{position}, update_time = #{updateTime} where contact_id = #{contactId}
